findings.description: Full class name `nablarch.core.validation.convertor.StringArrayConvertor` is missing from s3 hints. All other convertor full class names (`nablarch.core.validation.convertor.StringConvertor`, `nablarch.core.validation.convertor.LongConvertor`, `nablarch.core.validation.convertor.BigDecimalConvertor`) are included, making this omission inconsistent.
`Initializable` is missing from s3 hints. The source explicitly states that `ValidationManager` implements the `Initializable` interface and requires initialization configuration.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「ValidationManager クラスは初期化が必要なため、Initializable インタフェースを実装している」
